_note: Engine margin over a STATED baseline (no new data; same IBGE PAM + CHIRPS pooled panel as Gate 2). MSE skill score = 1 - MSE_engine/MSE_baseline (>0 = beats it). The pooled Pearson r vs the r=0 null is the headline margin; its cluster-robust CI is in gate2_payload.json pooled_cluster_robust. CONCURRENT skill (rainfall known), NOT a forecast. The MSE margin over climatology is modest by design: the linear annual elasticity under-predicts magnitude, so predictions sit near zero (sign/rank, not magnitude).
